methodology_summary: S18 v0.2 ships with 3 of 5 planned metrics live + 1 supplementary. v0.2 vs v0.1 delta: resolution_timing now LIVE (was pending due to missing end_unix in audit_ledger; now sourced from data/uma_disputes_raw.json closed_at_unix + resolved_at_unix). v0.3 will add uma_dispute_frequency (via Polygon RPC OO V2 contract events) + withdraw_success_rate (Polygon RPC withdraw monitor). Each metric graded A-D; composite is equal-weighted mean. Sources: audit_ledger + settlement_attestations + uma_disputes_raw (Polymarket Gamma /markets resolution metadata).

resolution_timing.metric_label: Median time from market close to UMA resolution
resolution_timing.note: Lower is better. Industry baseline: ≤24h is healthy. n=5999 markets · NEW v0.2 (was n=0 in v0.1).

settlement_accuracy.metric_label: W3 Polygon block-timestamp accuracy vs reported resolution
settlement_accuracy.note: Cross-check of Polymarket-reported timestamps against Polygon block ts.

backfill_coverage.metric_label: % of audit chains in resolved or backfilled state
backfill_coverage.note: Higher is better. Resolved chains without receipts indicate audit-trail gaps.

uma_bond_aggregate.metric_label: Aggregate UMA bond exposure (proxy for venue dispute-risk surface)
uma_bond_aggregate.note: Markets with high UMA bonds (≥$50K) are higher-stakes resolutions where disputes are more likely. Total exposure = sum of all bonds posted across closed markets.

planned_v03_components: uma_dispute_frequency  · ground-truth via Polygon RPC OO V2 contract events (DisputePrice events on 0xeE3Afe347D5C74317041E2618C49534dAf887c24)
withdraw_success_rate  · Polygon RPC monitor of CTFExchange withdraw txs
sources: data/uma_disputes_raw.json (NEW v60bz · Polymarket Gamma /markets · 6001 closed markets)
frame_3_role: Venue Desk · the Polymarket investigation beat · S&P/Moody's pattern · published quarterly
m_axis: M5 (methodology version-locked · v0.1 → v0.2 corrections-history audit)
